title: IDclust: Iterative clustering for unsupervised identification of cell types with single cell transcriptomics and epigenomics.
author: Prompsy P Saichi M Raimundo F Vallot C
content: S-EPMC11655290 PMC11655290 IDclust: Iterative clustering for unsupervised identification of cell types with single cell transcriptomics and epigenomics. The increasing diversity of single-cell datasets require systematic cell type characterization. Clustering is a critical step in single-cell
